name: Brief Review Focus file_ref click switches to Files changed and highlights the file
description: AC-14: from PR #482's Overview tab, the seeded Why+Risk Brief (cache HIT — head_sha matches the seeded PR, so no LLM call fires) renders a Review Focus item pointing at the seeded changed file src/config.ts. Clicking its file_ref button switches to the Files changed tab (?tab=diff) and scrolls to/highlights that file's row (client/src/app/repos/[repoId]/pulls/[number]/_components/DiffTab/scrollToFocusedFile.ts). Read-only seeded data (no model call). Assumes a freshly-seeded DB where acme/payments-api (PR #482) is the first repo — guaranteed by e2e-web.yml; run locally via the hermetic stack (see e2e/README.md).

cmd: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
steps.label: open the PR row
navigate to the PR detail route

cmd: Confirm the new rate-limit window default is safe for existing callers
steps.label: seeded Brief's Review Focus item renders (cache hit, no LLM call)
switches to the Files changed tab
the target file is visible in the diff viewer (scrolled to + highlighted)
